Database Maintenance

SQLite reclaims space and rebuilds indexes through PRAGMA optimize and VACUUM. Stillwater can run these on a schedule so query performance stays stable as the database grows; manual triggers are also available for one-off maintenance. Read more →

SQLite databases accumulate fragmentation over time, slowing queries and leaving freed pages on disk. Maintenance runs VACUUM and ANALYZE to compact the database file and refresh query planner statistics; trigger it manually or schedule it to run on its own.

Loading status...

Optimizing... Running vacuum...
How often the background optimize task runs automatically. Changes take effect after a restart. More frequent schedules keep query performance stable but add a small overhead on each run. Read more →

Runs PRAGMA optimize and WAL checkpoint on the selected interval. Requires restart to apply schedule changes.
